2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 108
Date 24 May 2026
Time 20:32
Title Infringement - Race Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Race Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed CAN DOC 108 - Race Deleted Lap Times .pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers

 
 
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 – 24 May 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 108 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  24 May 2026 
 
        Time  20:32 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Race 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 2, 4, 8, 10, and 14. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time
